# oras-proxy

ORAS proxy for .raw file objects

```bash
$ fastapi dev
$ curl http://localhost:port/ghcr.io/tulilirockz/zirconium/component:latest # This will fetch whatever is the main component for that image!
```

Sample output:

```bash
$ curl localhost:8000/ghcr.io/tulilirockz/zirconium/usr-verity-sig:latest
# {"rootHash":"6e3a4113bb8b6d1eebf5e0df64e5328e959684452ba1bef9bb4933d8eaafab57","certificateFingerprint":"6652a590231b5e764ce3f9d3ee0b8931bccb6a1d6e000bdac97bd06553bbaccd","signature":""}
```

This is heavily WIP! This is supposed to also expose `.raw` endpoints for each of the images in a registry.
